description: T2B PR2 callsite: commit_mode=diff_only → write diff to test-results/fixes/{N}.diff, NO commit.

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Healer detects commit_mode=diff_only and routes to write-diff pathway
rubric_hints.output_structure: diff_path field present; commit_sha is None (no commit happened)
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: Diff file exists at test-results/fixes/1234.diff; git log shows no new commit
